hooks.command: [ -n "$CLAUDE_DOCS_HOOK" ] && exit 0; SID=$(jq -r '.session_id // empty'); T="$HOME/.claude/projects/-Users-ryanhermes-Desktop-BIZTECH-Wearable/${SID}.jsonl"; [ -n "$SID" ] && [ -f "$T" ] && CLAUDE_DOCS_HOOK=1 claude -p "Read the transcript at '$T' and CLAUDE.md at '/Users/ryanhermes/Desktop/BIZTECH/Wearable/CLAUDE.md'. Only update CLAUDE.md if the session introduced facts a future Claude agent could not derive from the current file — e.g. a confirmed hardware constraint, a wiring decision, a phase change, or a physical limitation. If nothing meaningful changed, do nothing. Make minimal edits only." --allowedTools Read,Edit /Users/ryanhermes/Desktop/BIZTECH/Wearable 2>/dev/null || true
